symptom_vector: network packet corruption causing connection timeouts and handshake failures between services

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: cartservice 组件因网络数据包损坏导致 rrt_max 指标飙升2750倍，引发 checkoutservice 连接超时
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 cartservice-1 的 rrt_max 指标从正常值37.7秒飙升至22,501秒，变化率高达2750倍
Step 2: 分析 cartservice 的 client_error_ratio 指标p99值从0%升至47.65%，显示客户端连接异常
Step 3: 日志中发现 checkoutservice 调用 cartservice:7070 端口时出现 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp 10.233.46.196:7070: i/o timeout' 和 'timed out waiting for server handshake' 错误
Step 4: Trace数据确认 checkoutservice->cartservice 调用延迟从8.1秒增至22.4秒，错误传播路径为 cartservice→checkoutservice→frontend

critical_checks.instruction: 检查 cartservice 和 checkoutservice 的 rrt_max 指标是否出现灾难性增长

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Significant increase from 0% to high percentage
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 cartservice 的 client_error_ratio 指标是否从0%异常升高

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Response time degradation with high change ratio
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 checkoutservice 的 rrt 指标是否出现近200%的变化率
检查服务间请求指标是否出现异常模式
检查服务响应指标是否显示失败或超时

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains connection timeout errors with specific IP:port
critical_checks.instruction: 在 frontend 和 checkoutservice 日志中搜索 'Error while dialing' 和 'i/o timeout' 关键词

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains failure keywords in error messages
critical_checks.instruction: 搜索包含 'failure' 关键词的错误日志

critical_checks.target: Rpc error code canceled desc context canceled
critical_checks.instruction: 检查日志中是否存在 'rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled' 错误
搜索包含 'timeout' 关键词的日志记录
检查日志中是否存在 'Unavailable' 状态码或描述

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Extreme latency increase in service calls
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 checkoutservice->cartservice 调用链的延迟异常，检查是否出现2750倍增长
检查 frontend 调用链中是否出现因下游服务故障导致的错误传播
